facts.text: Toolkits Skip to main content America's Story Events Events Calendar Rededicate 250 Student Art Contest Freedom 250 Network Toolkits News Join the Network Shop Join the Network Shop Freedom 250 Toolkits Resources to Help Communities Celebrate Our Nation’s 250th Birthday As our Nation approaches its 250th birthday on July 4, 2026, Freedom 250 is proud to provide a suite of ready-to-use toolkits designed to help schools, state fairs, rodeos, communities, and event organizers join this historic moment.

Each toolkit offers plug-and-play ideas, patriotic programming suggestions, templates, and activations to help you bring the spirit of Freedom 250 to life—whether you’re planning a classroom activity, a statewide fair, or a major public celebration.

Freedom 250 Teacher Toolkit Low-cost, high-impact ways to celebrate the Nation’s 250th birthday in K-12 schools Classroom activities for elementary, middle, and high school Daily “Freedom Minute” ideas Recitations, essays, performances & field day concepts Living history projects, art competitions & hero-themed lessons Veterans Week activities and 1776-flag integrations Download the Teacher Toolkit Great American Fair Toolkit — Freedom 250 Edition Ideas to help state fairs become patriotic epicenters during the 2025–2026 fair seasons Grand entrances, patriotic decor & flag displays Concerts, fireworks, drone shows & red-white-blue programming Food, games & livestock integrations Branding guidance and activation ideas Opportunity to be recognized as the “Most Patriotic State Fair” at Freedom 250 Download the Fair Toolkit Great American Rodeo Toolkit — Freedom 250 Edition Patriotic integration ideas for rodeos nationwide — no new programming required Opening ceremony enhancements & flag presentations Freedom 250 branding, signage & social media participation Concert tie-ins, themed food, kids’ zone concepts & veteran salutes Freedom 250 ride designation, arena décor & merchandise tent options Simple, scalable ideas for every rodeo size Download the Rodeo Toolkit Freedom 250 City and State Toolkit Ideas, frameworks, and resources to help cities and states celebrate our Nation’s 250th Turnkey branding and visibility tools Civics and education programs Ready-to-host parks, recreation, and community events Arts, culture, and storytelling initiatives Access to national signature experiences Download the City and State Toolkit One Small Step Monthly toolkits from Americans for Prosperity Simple acts you can take every month to honor our Nation's history and inspire our future.
Each toolkit comes with guides, activities, and shareable content that make it easy to participate.
